phase: Autonomy Era · clearing the launch gates
headline: Sunday, Day 176 — the last quiet day before Monday reopens HR inboxes and starts the clock on Tuesday's send window. The build has sat finished at cycle 10 for over a week on the same 5 founder taps; today is for clearing them, not queuing them. No new inbox or transcript activity since Friday, and the EIN fax's ~8-business-day reply window closes this week — first revenue is down to arithmetic: 5 taps, then send.

spotlight.title: Last day to stage the B2B HR lane before Monday
spotlight.detail: Confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders are still in role, reveal work emails, and load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence in Apollo (~30 min, ≤6 credits) — plus the one-command launch_config.env fill that unblocks all 3 lanes (~15 min, free). Get both done today and the send is loaded to fire Tuesday morning, the real peak-open window once Monday's backlog clears.

spotlight.title: Fund + approve the Lob postcard — still the fastest path to a booked appointment
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70, 15 min: open + fund a Lob account, approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md. Approve today and the 77 TIER1 cards print Monday, landing in mailboxes midweek — zero TCPA exposure, no enrichment needed, every card QR-attributable.

spotlight.title: Same two 5-minute fixes, still open
spotlight.detail: The autoloop's launchd job has errored since Jun 28 (cycle 10 frozen on 'Operation not permitted') — grant Full Disk Access or re-run install-scheduler.sh to bring the 09:00/21:00 cycles back. While in there: refresh the dead ATTOM key (trial 401s, 1 min) and fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads and light up the cold-email lane.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-filed via fax on the Jun 27-28 call — ~8-business-day turnaround, closing this week. The moment it lands, A2P submits and SMS/outbound-calling opens. Neither of today's two launch lanes (B2B HR email, Lob postcard) needs EIN, so the revenue motion isn't waiting on it.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: All 3 lanes are built and merge-ready; the autoloop hit cycle 10 over a week ago and deliberately stopped adding build because the only bottleneck left is these 5 taps, not code. Frankie: approve the B2B HR lane, fund+approve the Lob postcard, fill the launch values. Chitraksh: refresh the ATTOM key, fund BatchData, fix the launchd permission error.

tasks.lead: WALK INTO ENVISION HONDA MILPITAS · 1 PM PT
tasks.detail: suited up, fresh haircut, iPad with the Oraya-branded dealership deck. Ask for Greg (introduced you on phone yesterday) then GSM Mo. Reciprocity opener: "I'm semi-interested in the Prologue hybrid — mind if I poke around while we talk?" — lower the sales-resistance, demo the system on iPad once warm. Calendar event already created with location pinned + Chitraksh on as optional.

tasks.lead: Test outbound v126 + inbound v15 end-to-end
tasks.detail: on at least 2 fresh test scenarios · pretend-flow on inbound: voicemail callback → opt-in → calendar slot. Confirm calendar event, email confirmation, SMS — all three — land on each test.
(mailed May 22) · expected Thursday or Friday landing. The moment it hits, A2P submits.

tasks.lead: Plug Mom's policy from daughter's mother
tasks.detail: the manufactured $3K of ad-budget cash. Theresa policies cancelled with grace given her son's passing — don't disturb. Day-job checks running parallel.

tasks.lead: Pull up the Real Estate P3 visual reference
tasks.detail: with Chitraksh on the next sync · lock the deal-card UI design (comparables + ARV pie chart + urgency countdown). Plan for Mom + Art handoff once P2 generates first dollar.
back-end of month. Frankie's card on amazon.in with monitor (per Chitraksh's request). Coordinate Zoom unbox/setup. "Hold me to it — you should have it in the next 7 days."

tasks.lead: Pick a window for the Chitraksh-parents intro
tasks.detail: before 11am or after 8pm Frankie-time. Cup-of-coffee energy, not pitch.
May 23-26 slip-then-recover. Fixed block is the rule, not the suggestion.

tasks.lead: Test the inbound agent edited opener tonight
tasks.detail: confirm the outbound-snippet ported in worked correctly. If clean, tomorrow morning kick off the first 60-lead outbound batch.
Marketing Retainer + Meta ads next-out once A2P approves · Pizza Hut lesson logged (over-transparency = system risk) · military-couple compare-meeting still need to book if you want to retain.
lines open 8 AM PT; Chitraksh handles 8-11 AM India-side rotation; Frankie picks up post-day-job. Backup: file SS-4 via fax for guaranteed 4-business-day turnaround.
main HQ + linked Lead-Gen Dashboard + new Real Estate section + Lead-Gen tab. Vercel auto-deploys on push.
Chitraksh on standby in case Frankie needs a live G-Meet pull-in for live demo or live Q&A. Have outbound voice agent on demo-mode ready to dial Frankie's phone for in-person playback.

tasks.lead: Build the dynamic Oraya dealership deck
tasks.detail: from the Mercedes offer letter · Oraya UI / logo / color scheme · capability matrix · deliverables on PDF for Frankie's iPad.
$20 each on ATTOM + BatchData + PropertyRadar · same TX new-homeowner pull across all three · compare data quality + cold-outreach conversion · pick the winner.

tasks.lead: Verify outbound v126 + inbound v15 backend
tasks.detail: on 5 fresh test calls · confirm calendar / email / SMS / DNC / admin log all firing on each · spot-check the digit-conversion fix on at least 3 "spoken digit" emails.

port the single-prompt agent (archived from P2 fork) into the investor-blast prototype · ingest the Oraya site clone visual as the deal-card UI reference · scaffold a Postgres schema for the investor DB + the seller-contract DB.
(8:30 PM-11:30 PM IST) · ride out auto-disconnects, retry until a live agent picks up · certified-mail track running parallel.

tasks.lead: Twin Mind transcript → dashboard auto-update pipeline
tasks.detail: complete the webhook so post-block dashboard updates push automatically without manual edit-loop.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name vs. legal entity; file with operating county; publish in adjudicated newspaper for 4 consecutive weeks; bake receipt into the A2P package.
queue providers, prepare SoS filing, synchronized public-facing address flip the moment A2P approves.

tasks.lead: Stand up the CEO sub-agent on the Mac Mini
tasks.detail: when it arrives · first sub-agent online: dashboard. Then legal / engineer / marketing / lead-gen + follow-up one per shipping week.
day-trading agent (Frankie + Chitraksh aligned May 27 — revenue potential lower than P2/P3/voice, back-tests don't translate to live).

waiting.what: LOWEST-FRICTION first conversation (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits): launch the B2B HR lane (09_b2b_hr_lane) — confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders still in role, reveal work emails, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve before send. Holiday weekend = prep window so it fires Tuesday
FASTEST first booked appointment (~$50-70, 15 min): open + fund a Lob account and approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, QR-attributable
Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes: cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill 20 blanks, run apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible
Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min) — trial key returns 401. New key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key
Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane); also 5-min launchd permission fix to un-freeze the autoloop scheduler
